title: Cherry BBQ Chicken Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, featuring cherry BBQ sauce and crispy flatbread.

ingredients.name: Crispy flatbread
ingredients.notes: found in most grocery stores or made from scratch

instructions: Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
Bake chicken in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, warm the flatbread slices in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
In a small saucepan, heat the cherry BBQ sauce over medium heat.
Once the chicken is done, slice it into thin strips.
Assemble tacos by placing a few slices of chicken onto a warmed flatbread slice.
Top with sliced red onion, diced cilantro, sliced avocado, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Drizzle with cherry BBQ sauce and serve immediately.
